 # superstore-sales-dashboard 
Excel dashboard project analyzing sales, profit, and customer trends

**🔹 Project Overview**
This project focuses on analyzing sales, profit, and customer trends using Excel. The objective is to transform raw data into meaningful insights through an interactive and visually appealing dashboard.

**🔹 Tools & Skills Used**
Microsoft Excel
Data Analysis
Pivot Tables
Data Visualization (Charts & Slicers)

**🔹 Workflow**
Loaded and understood the dataset
Organized data using pivot tables
Created charts to visualize key metrics
Built an interactive dashboard using slicers

**🔹 Key Insights**
The Technology category recorded the highest sales
Sales show a steady growth trend over the years
Some sub-categories generate low profit despite high sales
Regional performance varies significantly across markets
